title: Phase 010 — Coco-Index Few-Shot Exemplars + Memory LLM-Curated Context
description: Phase 010 — ADAPT pt-03 RQ-A4 (coco few-shot exemplars) + RQ-B2 (memory LLM-curated context packaging). Two presentation-layer features in one packet — neither alters scoring authority. Coco exemplars in SEPARATE response group `exemplars: [...]` from new local SQLite/vec0 table; capped storage + TTL + reconciliation + ccc_examples_clear maintenance. Memory data.curatedContext as post-retrieval packaging plan with strict JSON schema validation; budget split (retrievalCandidateLimit + presentationLimit + curationTokenBudget); LLM cache extension. Both default-off + shadow-first + Phase-005 lift required for active mode. ~500-800 prod LOC + ~340-570 tests across 5 sub-phases.
